mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM patient
AND patient_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{patientName}, '%')
AND id IN (SELECT DISTINCT r.patient_id FROM registration r WHERE r.doctor_id = #{doctorId})
ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM patient
AND patient_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{patientName}, '%')
AND id IN (SELECT DISTINCT r.patient_id FROM registration r WHERE r.doctor_id = #{doctorId})
